_comment: ClassGuard Chrome Extension — Google Admin Force-Install Policy
1. In Google Admin Console, go to:
Devices > Chrome > Apps & Extensions > Users & Browsers
2. Select the target Organizational Unit (OU) or group.
3. Click the '+' button > Add from Chrome Web Store.
5. Under 'Policy for extensions', paste the contents of the
Devices > Chrome > Policy > Upload Chrome policy
- Replace EXTENSION_ID with the published Chrome Web Store extension ID.
- Replace CLASSGUARD_BACKEND_URL with your server URL,
- Replace CLASSGUARD_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID with your OAuth 2.0 client ID
(found in Google Cloud Console > APIs & Services > Credentials).
